_doc: v0.4 baseline: W-AR-02 misses on empty-string justification. The Jena noValue(?rat, uofa:justification) check returns false (predicate is bound to a value, even if empty), so the rule does not fire. Documents the brittleness from spec §3.3.7 with v0.4.1 fixture-authoring provenance.
rationale: Jena noValue() checks predicate-presence, not value-emptiness.
